headline: Connection Earns Zebra Technologies’ 2025 Partner of the Year Award
summary: MERRIMACK, N.H., March 18, 2026--Connection (PC Connection, Inc.; NASDAQ: CNXN), a leading provider of information technology solutions to business, government, healthcare, and education markets, has been named Zebra Technologies’ 2025 Partner of the Year—Top Revenue Growth National Solutions Provider (NSP), recognizing exceptional year‑over‑year revenue growth and outstanding performance in delivering Zebra solutions to customers.
